# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of our project and our users' data very seriously. If you have discovered any security vulnerabilities, broken links, or issues that may pose a risk to users, please report them privately.

### How to Report
Please do not report security issues in public Issues. Instead, contact the repository owner (jobiryasir) directly via:

- **GitHub Messaging:** Reach out through GitHub's private messaging system.
- **Email:** jobiryasir81@gmail.com

We will review all reports and address valid security concerns as quickly as possible. Thank you for your cooperation in keeping this project secure.
